description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and light gray stripes running parallel across its top surface. The block is solid and has a substantial, heavy appearance, with sharp, clean edges and a uniform thickness. The striped pattern is consistent on the top face, while the sides are solid black, giving the block a bold, modern look. The surface of the stone appears slightly rough and matte, suggesting a natural or minimally finished stone material. There are no visible engravings, markings, or signs of significant weathering on the block. Its design suggests it could serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a decorative curb, plaza divider, or protective boundary.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and light gray stripes on top and solid black sides, featuring a rough, matte stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the block and the parallel striped pattern extending from front to back.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top and solid black rear face visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the block's thickness and the continuation of the striped pattern.
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned as part of a row of similar blocks
